contactTemplates.whatsappMessage: Hello Manthan — I found your portfolio and would like to discuss a project. When are you available for a short 30-minute call?
contactTemplates.emailBody: Hello Manthan,%0D%0A%0D%0AI'd like to discuss a project. Please let me know your availability for a 30-minute call.%0D%0A%0D%0AThanks,%0D%0A[Your name]

about.summary: Hi! I'm Manthan Gajjar, a passionate and experienced Full Stack Web Developer working as a freelancer under the name MG dev. I specialize in building scalable, responsive, and custom websites. Whether you need a single-page app, full SaaS platform, admin dashboard, or custom website, I can bring your vision to life with clean code, optimized performance, and beautiful UI/UX.
whyWorkWithMe: Open to solo or team-based work

webDevelopment.title: Full-Stack Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Custom Website Design & Development, Frontend with React & Next.js, Backend with Node.js & Express.

mobileDevelopment.title: Mobile App (Flutter)
mobileDevelopment.description: Cross-platform mobile apps (iOS & Android) with Flutter, app store submission and CI/CD.

backendDevelopment.description: Scalable server-side apps, auth, databases and background jobs.
